add_params.name: tenantID
add_params.description: Tenant domain/ID. Formatter reads from useSettings().currentTenant and sends as 'tenantID' (not tenantFilter).

add_params.name: username
add_params.description: Mailbox alias (local part of email; combined with domain server-side as username@domain)

add_params.name: domain
add_params.description: Domain extracted from autocomplete object .value by formatter

add_params.name: addedAliases
add_params.description: Newline-separated aliases; PS1 splits on \n. Not sent by default form but accepted.

notes: customDataformatter renames the ambient tenantFilter (from useSettings) to 'tenantID', unwraps the domain autocomplete object to its .value string, and passes username directly. The PS1 reads $Request.Body.tenantID (not tenantFilter) and combines username + domain into the email address.
